author: Chellys Kitchen
description: Backend API for Chellys Kitchen - Fastify + TypeScript
name: chellys-kitchen-backend

scripts.build: prisma generate && tsc && cp -r prisma/migrations dist/prisma/migrations && cp prisma/schema.prisma dist/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.start: prisma migrate deploy --schema=dist/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db seed && node dist/server.js
scripts.start:render: npm run build && prisma migrate deploy && prisma db seed && node dist/server.js
